nasb.text: On all the bare heights in the wilderness Destroyers have come, For a sword of the Lord is devouring From one end of the land even to the other; There is no peace for anyone.

esv.text: Upon all the bare heights in the desert destroyers have come, for the sword of the Lord devours from one end of the land to the other; no flesh has peace.

cnv.text: 在曠野一切光禿的高岡上， 行毀滅的已經來到了； 因為耶和華的刀。 從地這邊直到地那邊，要吞滅一切； 人人都沒有平安。

ccb.text: 杀戮者已来到旷野中光秃的山岭， 耶和华使刀剑横扫全境， 无人幸免。
